response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack and systems experience across diverse stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java) and high-throughput environments like Dunnhumby/Sociomantic. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing infrastructure, telemetry/metrics platforms, or growth engineering — the central focus of this Principal/IC6 role. Leadership signals (mentoring, multi-team initiatives, architectural ownership at scale) are also light relative to IC6 expectations.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background including C/C++, Java, TypeScript, and Python-adjacent stacks
High-throughput, low-latency systems experience at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Strong craftsmanship discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops, and OSS founder work
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation, A/B testing, or feature-flagging platforms
Limited evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure or statistical/experimental analysis work
Title progression and scope (mostly senior IC, small teams) below Principal/IC6 expectations

key_factors.factor: Polyglot engineering depth and longevity (13+ yrs)
Limited Principal-level scope and cross-team leadership signals
